This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] div role is tablist
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] role is tab (in div tablist)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] role is tabpanel (with sibling div tablist)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div role is tablist (with selection)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] role is tab and tab is selected

[FAIL] role is tab and tab is not selected

[FAIL] role is tabpanel (faux unselected)
